LanguageData.WB_KumachanCylinder.label: bearly cylinder
LanguageData.WB_KumachanCylinder.description: no oxygen gauge included—don’t worry about how much is left.
LanguageData.WB_OxygenRibbonBrooch.label: oxygen ribbon brooch
LanguageData.WB_OxygenRibbonBrooch.description: oxygen is received from the bearly cylinder here.
